text.title: Freelance SaaS Billing Decision Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding Freelance SaaS Billing Decision. Each pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: All 4 signals (value_predictability, primary_value_driver, expansion_surface, customer_size) MUST be scored before decision.
rule.rationale: Single-axis choices ignore tradeoffs; 4 signals surface the conflict.

rule.statement: Decision record MUST include kill-criteria per option (numeric trigger to revisit).
rule.rationale: Without kill-criteria, billing locks in even when wrong.

rule.statement: Decision MUST be reassessed at either 100 paying customers OR 6 months, whichever comes first.
rule.rationale: Both volume + time stress-test the original signal scores.

rule.statement: Published pricing page MUST show the unit math (per-seat × $X, per-action × $Y, or hybrid). Hidden math is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Customers reject billing they can't predict.

rule.statement: Billing model changes MUST go through a separate decision record + 30-day notice to existing customers. No mid-cycle silent migration.
